paper_title: Ancient DNA Analysis and Biostatistical Methods

methods.method_name: Ancient DNA Extraction and Library Preparation
methods.description: Process for extracting DNA from ancient bone and teeth samples, preparing libraries, and sequencing them to analyze ancient genetic material.

steps.description: Samples were cleaned from earth and potential contaminants and the teeth were wiped with 1-3% NaOCl solution and ddH2O, and were thereafter subjected to UV radiation at about 6 J/cm2 at 254 nm.
steps.searchable_summary: clean and decontaminate samples using NaOCl and UV radiation

steps.description: Bone powder or bone fragments were obtained using a Dremel drill.
steps.searchable_summary: obtain bone powder using a Dremel drill

steps.description: The samples were digested in 1 M Urea, EDTA (0.5 M) and Proteinase K (10 mg/ml).
steps.searchable_summary: digest samples using Urea, EDTA, and Proteinase K

steps.description: DNA extract was concentrated using Amicon filters and purified with silica-based MinElute spin columns.
steps.searchable_summary: concentrate and purify DNA using Amicon filters and MinElute spin columns

steps.description: Double-stranded blunt-end Illumina genomic libraries were prepared from 20 µl DNA following Meyer & Kircher protocol.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare Illumina genomic libraries from DNA

steps.description: Libraries were sequenced using Illumina HiSeq X platform.
steps.searchable_summary: sequence libraries using Illumina HiSeq X

methods.description: Processing and mapping of sequence data to the human reference genome, including filtering and preparation for comparative analysis.

steps.description: Paired-end reads with a minimum 11 bp overlap were merged and residual adapter sequences were trimmed.
steps.searchable_summary: merge paired-end reads and trim adapter sequences

steps.description: Merged reads were mapped to the human reference genome using BWA.
steps.searchable_summary: map reads to human reference genome using BWA

steps.description: PCR duplicates were filtered using FilterUniqSAMCons_cc.py.
Reads mapped to the reference genome with more than 10% mismatches and shorter than 35 bp were filtered.
steps.searchable_summary: filter reads with high mismatches and short length

methods.description: Assessment of ancient DNA authenticity through nucleotide misincorporation patterns and contamination estimation.

steps.description: Ancient DNA specific nucleotide misincorporation patterns were examined using PMDtools.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze nucleotide misincorporation patterns with PMDtools

steps.description: Mitochondrial DNA based contamination estimation was performed using methods developed by Green et al. and Fu et al.
steps.searchable_summary: estimate contamination using Green and Fu methods

methods.description: Determination of biological sex using read mapping ratios to X and Y chromosomes.

steps.description: Ratio of reads mapping to Y chromosome to the reads mapping to both X and Y chromosome was calculated.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate read mapping ratio for sex determination

methods.description: Statistical analysis of mitochondrial haplogroup frequencies, genetic differentiation, and haplotype diversity.

steps.description: Mitochondrial haplogroup frequencies and 95% confidence intervals were calculated using a Bayesian method.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate haplogroup frequencies with Bayesian method

steps.description: Principal component analysis (PCA) was performed using 'PCA' function of 'FactoMineR' library in R.
steps.searchable_summary: perform PCA using FactoMineR in R

steps.description: Slatkin's linearized F ST between pairs of populations was calculated and significance assessed by random permutations.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate F ST and assess significance with permutations

steps.description: Non-metric multidimensional scaling (NMDS) on F ST values was performed using 'metaMDS' function in 'vegan' library.
steps.searchable_summary: perform NMDS on F ST values using vegan in R

steps.description: Mitochondrial haplotype diversity was calculated using DnaSP v.6.
